response.justification: The candidate is a broadly experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship values (TDD, CI/CD) and some high-throughput systems exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, but the profile does not match a Principal IC6 growth/experimentation role. There is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis work, and no demonstrated track record of leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives at enterprise scale. Career trajectory is senior/staff at small-to-mid companies rather than principal-level systemic ownership.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience across web, backend, mobile, and embedded, exceeding the 8-year requirement
Low-latency, high-throughput micro-services experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong quality culture: TDD, testing tools authorship, workshops, and mentoring/knowledge sharing
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, or growth-measurement platform experience
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure ownership or statistical/experimental analysis skills
No demonstrated principal-level scope: leading cross-team initiatives or platforms adopted by multiple teams at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Solid engineering fundamentals and quality practices
